name: Bilibili WBI 签名算法
description: 2023+ Bilibili API 防爬签名机制，大部分接口需要 w_rid + wts 参数

step_1.description: 获取密钥：从 nav API 提取 img_key 和 sub_key
step_1.extract: data.wbi_img.img_url 和 data.wbi_img.sub_url 的文件名（去掉扩展名）

step_2.description: 生成 mixin_key：按固定混淆表重排 img_key+sub_key 并截取前32位

steps: 添加 wts = 当前 Unix 时间戳（秒）
按 key 字母序排序所有参数
过滤 value 中的 !'()* 字符

python_implementation:
from functools import reduce
from hashlib import md5
import urllib.parse, time, requests

mixinKeyEncTab = [46,47,18,2,53,8,23,32,15,50,10,31,58,3,45,35,27,43,5,49,33,9,42,19,29,28,14,39,12,38,41,13,37,48,7,16,24,55,40,61,26,17,0,1,60,51,30,4,22,25,54,21,56,59,6,63,57,62,11,36,20,34,44,52]

def getMixinKey(orig: str) -> str:
    return reduce(lambda s, i: s + orig[i], mixinKeyEncTab, '')[:32]

def getWbiKeys() -> tuple[str, str]:
    resp = requests.get('https://api.bilibili.com/x/web-interface/nav')
    data = resp.json()['data']['wbi_img']
    img_key = data['img_url'].rsplit('/', 1)[1].split('.')[0]
    sub_key = data['sub_url'].rsplit('/', 1)[1].split('.')[0]
    return img_key, sub_key

def encWbi(params: dict, img_key: str, sub_key: str) -> dict:
    mixin_key = getMixinKey(img_key + sub_key)
    params['wts'] = round(time.time())
    params = dict(sorted(params.items()))
    params = {k: ''.join(c for c in str(v) if c not in "!'()*") for k, v in params.items()}
    query = urllib.parse.urlencode(params)
    params['w_rid'] = md5((query + mixin_key).encode()).hexdigest()
    return params

# 使用示例:
# img_key, sub_key = getWbiKeys()
# signed = encWbi({'bvid': 'BV1xx411c7mD'}, img_key, sub_key)
# resp = requests.get('https://api.bilibili.com/x/web-interface/wbi/view/detail', params=signed)
key_rotation: 密钥会定期轮换，建议每次请求前重新获取或缓存几分钟
